steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Both terms contain the same absolute-value expression.
$$2|4-x|+3|4-x|=5|4-x|$$
So the equation becomes $5|4-x|=25$.

steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content:
Divide by $5$, then use the two absolute-value cases.
$$|4-x|=5$$
$$4-x=5$$
$$4-x=-5$$

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: Solving the two equations gives $x=-1$ and $x=9$. The question asks for the positive solution. The answer is 9.
